title: crotalaria excisa
intro: Crotalaria excisa, also known as the scrub crotalaria, is a small shrub native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria excisa include its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Crotalaria excisa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and its leaves and stems can be used in traditional remedies, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity.
